message:
fix(agent): use config-resolved extension policy in enable_extensions instead of Default

agent.rs:
- Add resolve_extension_policy_for_enable() helper that resolves the
  extension policy from Config when no explicit policy is provided,
  instead of falling back to ExtensionPolicy::default() which ignores
  the user's settings.json configuration (defaultPermissive, profile)
- Apply resolved policy consistently to both JS and WASM extension host
  initialization (WasmExtensionHost::new now receives the resolved
  policy instead of the raw Option unwrapped to default)

openai_responses.rs:
- Reformat map_or_else closure in end_tool_call() per rustfmt style
  (no functional change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
